title: Cultivation of Plasmodium falciparum in Serum-Free Media with Growth-Promoting Factor
author: Unknown

steps.title: Step 2 Start cultures of Plasmodium...
steps.instruction: Step 2 Start cultures of Plasmodium falciparum Preserve erythrocytes (RBCs) in Alsever’s solution* at 4 °C for 3– 30 days. Wash RBCs by centrifugation for 10 min at 800g, admixed with RBCs infected with Plasmodium falciparum (PfRBCs), dispense into 24-well culture plates at a hematocrit of 2% (1 ml of suspension/well), and culture in a humidified atmosphere of 5%CO 2 , 5% O 2 , and 90% N 2 at 37°C. Adjust the parasitemia to 0.1% (for subculture) or 0.3%(for growth tests) by adding uninfected RBCs, and the hematocrit to 2% by adding the appropriate volume of culture medium. *Alsever’s solution: Solubilize the following constituents in 200 ml distilled water. Autoclave the mixture and add to whole blood or RBCs at 1:1 to 1:4. (1) Glucose 4.1g (2) NaCl 0.84g (3) Na 3 citrate.2H 2 O 1.6g (4) Citric acid 0.11g

steps.title: step 3 Preparation of highly, synchronized...
steps.instruction: step 3 Preparation of highly, synchronized cultures at the ring stage: The cultures of Plasmodium falciparum are synchronized at the ring stage by three successive exposures to 5% D-sorbitol. Expose asynchronous PfRBCs to 5% (w/v) D-sorbitol (Sigma-Aldrich) for 5 min. After washing with basal medium by centrifugation for 6 min at 500g, adjust the parasitemia to 0.8%–1.2% by adding uninfected RBCs, dispense into 24-well culture plates at a hematocrit of 2%, and cultured for 41 h. At 41-h culture, expose the PfRBCs to 5% D-sorbitol (the 2nd exposure), wash, and culture for further 5 h. At the total 46-h culture, expose the PfRBCs to 5% D-sorbitol (the 3rd exposure). After the 3rd sorbitol treatment, remove residual schizonts and cell debris by isopycnic density centrifugation for 10 min at 800g on 63% Percoll PLUS* (GE Healthcare Bio-Science Corp., Tokyo, Japan). *3.5 ml 90% Percoll PLUS + 1.5 ml PBS 90% Percoll PLUS is prepared by admixing 100% Percoll PLUS (9 parts) with 1.5 M NaCl (10x physiological saline) (1 part). Note: Periods for growth to the schizont stage are somewhat variable among strains. Culture periods useful for the protocol should be confirmed beforehand.
